steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Pre-engagement: Obtain written authorization, define scope, document rules of engagement
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for pentest phase checklist
steps.expected_output: Signed contracts and documented scope preventing legal and technical issues

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Reconnaissance: Conduct passive recon before active scanning begins
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive passive intelligence informing active testing approach

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Enumeration: Systematically identify services, versions, and potential vulnerabilities
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Complete inventory of target services and known vulnerability associations

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Exploitation: Validate vulnerabilities with successful exploits and shell access
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Confirmed code execution on target systems with evidence

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Post-exploitation: Escalate privileges, move laterally, and document access
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Demonstrated full attack chain with multiple system compromises

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Reporting: Compile findings, prioritize risks, document remediation
steps.expected_output: Professional report suitable for executive and technical audiences

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Verification: Retest fixed vulnerabilities confirming remediation success
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Confirmed closure of vulnerabilities through independent verification
